name: LLM Gateway Dev
postCreateCommand: sudo curl -fsSL https://packages.redis.io/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/redis-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/redis-archive-keyring.gpg] https://packages.redis.io/deb $(lsb_release -cs) main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/redis.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y redis-stack-server && pip install --user -r gateway/router/requirements.txt && pip install --user -r shadow-eval/requirements.txt && npm install -g promptfoo
